title: Kotlin ‘For’ loop
summary: While converting all my java code to kotlin, one of the strange syntax change I observed was the for loop in both the languages. Later I realized in Kotlin, there are few concepts which are completely different from java or any other another language for loops.
content: While converting all my java code to kotlin, one of the strange syntax change I observed was the for loop in both the languages. Later I realized in Kotlin, there are few concepts which are completely different from java or any other another language for loops.
